title: CoffeeReffass - Premium Coffee Experience
description: A full responsive website built for a local coffee business with dynamic product pages, clean UI, and smooth animations.

title: E-Commerce App
description: A modern e-commerce app built with Flutter and Firebase featuring auth, product browsing, cart, favorites, checkout with address & payment management.

title: ECAI - Exam Correction AI
description: An end-to-end AI exam grading system. It allows teachers to capture student answer sheets, run OpenCV image quality checks, and automatically grade them with a vision-enabled LLM (Mistral API) against an uploaded PDF question key.
